name: ASUS TUF GAMING B860M-PLUS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8800+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C (DP Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7

description: ASUS TUF GAMING B860M-PLUS WIFI Micro-ATX gaming motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5, and Wi-Fi 7 for Intel LGA 1851.
